description: Horizontal designed graphic with a '#PetPreparedness' theme. The background is cream/beige with a faint repeating pattern of dog-bone, fish, and paw-print line illustrations. Top-left has a brown rounded banner with white serif text 'Pet Preparedness Tips.' Below it, dark sans-serif body text reads: 'Please meet Indy. Here's how I prepare her for the summer: 1. I keep a collapsible water bowl, a water bottle, a towel, and treats in my vehicle. 2. To keep her safe, I never leave her in the car alone and ensure she gets rest in the shade and plenty of water on warmer days. 3. On really hot days, I take her to wineries and restaurants in the area that permit dogs. She also participates in dock diving and really loves to swim.' On the right is a rounded-corner color photograph of a woman in a purple jacket standing behind a tasting bar lined with wine bottles; a black-and-white border collie or Australian shepherd type dog sits facing her in the foreground. Beneath the photo a bold black serif name reads 'Deborah & Indy,' with a teal/blue accent line and the text 'DHS S&T' and 'Program Analyst.' The circular DHS seal appears at bottom-right.
notable_text: Pet Preparedness Tips; Deborah & Indy; DHS S&T; Program Analyst
